## Summary
- What changed? Why?

## Testing
- Commands run (build/lint/tests) and results:
- If not run, explain why.

## Safety / Policy
- Does this touch auth/policy/quotas? If yes, what changed and how is it enforced?
- Any new env vars? Defaults documented?

## Screenshots (if UI)
- Before/After if relevant.

## Follow-ups
- Any TODOs or related issues to file?
